nasb.text: Moreover, I will make you a desolation and a reproach among the nations which surround you, in the sight of all who pass by.

esv.text: Moreover, I will make you a desolation and an object of reproach among the nations all around you and in the sight of all who pass by.

cnv.text: 我要使你變成荒地，使你在你四圍的列國中和在所有路過的人眼前，成為羞辱的對象。

ccb.text: 我必使你们的家园在周围的列国中，在路人眼前成为荒凉之地，使你们饱受羞辱。
